subcodes.first_line: O my God! Verily, the tabernacle of justice hath been pitched in the east and the west of this Holy Land
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم ان سرادق العدل قد ضربت اطنابها علی هذه الارض المقدسه فی مشارقها و مغاربها
full_text_parts: O my God! Verily, the tabernacle of justice hath been pitched in the east and the west of this Holy Land. We yield Thee praise and thanksgiving for the arrival of this just authority and triumphant government, which exerciseth its power for the comfort of its subjects and the well-being of all people. O God! Assist Thou the great emperor George V, the King of England, through Thine eternal grace and Thy divine confirmations. Maintain then its sheltering shade over this venerable land through Thine aid, protection, and preservation. Verily, Thou art the Almighty, the Most Exalted, the All-Glorious, the Most Bountiful.
